# mds-grid

This component is **deprecated** as it is enough to use plain HTML with the help of frameworks like [TailwindCSS][tailwind] like in the example below:

```html
<div class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-2">
  <div>Column 1</div>
  <div>Column 2</div>
</div>
```

[tailwind]: https://tailwindcss.com/docs/grid-template-columns
